message:
🖼️ WEDNESDAY PICTURE CHALLENGE 🖼️
Good morning everybody! 👋

📍 This week's scene: A family having breakfast in the kitchen 🍳

🎯 Try to describe what you see! Focus on:
👨‍👩‍👧 The people — who are they and how do they look?
🍞 The food and objects on the table
⏳ What is everyone doing right now? (present continuous)

🗣️ Send a voice note or video describing the picture — the more detail, the better!

🖼️ WEDNESDAY PICTURE CHALLENGE 🖼️
Good morning everybody! 👋

📍 This week's scene: A child doing homework while the parents cook 📓

🎯 Try to describe what you see! Focus on:
🏠 The rooms and where everyone is
✍️ The actions — what is each person doing?
🧸 The objects you can see around them

🗣️ Send a voice note or video describing the picture — the more detail, the better!

🖼️ WEDNESDAY PICTURE CHALLENGE 🖼️
Good morning everybody! 👋
